If you do what it says, you will have God’s blessing. Never just listen to his teaching and forget what you heard
You might think you are a very religious person. But if your tongue is out of control, you are fooling yourself. and his religion is worthless.

The right way that God the Father wants us to serve Him is to care for children who do not have parents and to help widows who are suffering. And you must keep away from sin and all the things that are wrong in the world.
My dear brothers and sisters, you are believers in our glorious Lord Jesus Christ. So don’t treat some people better than others
Suppose someone comes into your meeting wearing very nice clothes and a gold ring. At the same time a poor person comes in wearing old, dirty clothes.

You show special attention to the person wearing nice shinny clothes. You say, Sit here in this good seat. But you say to the poor person, Stand there!” or “Sit on the floor by our feet! James 2: 4 Doesn’t this show that you think some people are more important than others? You set yourselves up as judges who make bad decisions.
Listen, my dear brothers and sisters. God chose the poor people in the world to be rich in faith. He chose them to receive the kingdom God promised to those who love him
But you show no respect to those who are poor. And you know that the rich are the ones who always try to control your lives. And they are the ones who take you to court.
And the rich are the ones who insult the wonderful name of Christ, the name by which you are known
One law rules over all other laws. This royal law is found in the Scriptures: “Love your neighbor the same as you love yourself.” If you obey this law, you are doing right.
But if you are treating one person as more important than another, you are sinning. You are guilty of breaking God’s law.
You might follow all of God’s law. But if you fail to obey only one command, you are guilty of breaking all the commands in that law.
God said, Don’t commit adultery. The same God also said, Don’t kill. So if you don’t commit adultery, but you kill someone, you are guilty of breaking all of God’s law
You will be judged by the law that makes people free. You should remember this in everything you say and do.
Yes, you must show mercy to others. If you do not show mercy, then God will not show mercy to you when he judges you. But the one who shows mercy can stand without fear before the Judge.
Before the world was created, the Word was there. The Word was with God, and the Word was God
2 The Word was with God in the beginning.
Everything was made through the Word, and nothing was made without the Word.
In the Word there was life, and the life was the light of men.
The light shines in the darkness and the dark cannot overcome the light.
There was a man named John, he was sent by God.
John came to tell people about the light, so that everyone who heard it could believe.
John was not the light, but God sent him to tell people that the light was coming.

The true light, The Word, was coming into the world. This is the true light that gives light to all people. John 1: 10 The Word was already in the world. The world was made by the Word, but the world did not know him.
The Word came to his own people, but they did not accept Him.
Some people accept Him, and he gave them the right to become the children of God. But only those people who believed in him.
They were born again and became God’s children. Not the way babies are born. It was not because of any human desire or plan. They were born from God himself.
The Word became a man and lived among us. We saw his greatness—the greatness that belongs to the only born Son of the Father. The Word was full of grace and truth.

John the Baptist told the people about the Word. John shouted and said: This is the Man that I told you about when I said: Someone will come after me, but He is more important than I am because He lived long before I was born.
Word was full of grace and truth, and from him we all received one blessing after another
God gave his laws to Moses and Moses gave them to us, but we received grace and truth from Jesus Christ.
No one has ever seen God. The only Son is the one who has shown us what God is like. Jesus himself is God and is very close to the Father
This was John’s testimony when the Jews sent a few priests and Levites from Jerusalem to John. They asked John: Who are you?
John wanted them to know so he told the truth. John told them: I am not the Christ.
Then the priest asked John: Then who are you? Are you Elijah? John said: No, I am not Elijah. They asked: Are you the Prophet? John answered: No.
Then the priest asked John: Who are you? Tell us, and we will go and tell the people who sent us. What do you say about yourself?
John said: I am the man who shouts in the desert to prepare the way for the Lord. This is what the prophet Isaiah said.
These Jews were sent from the Pharisees
They ask John: You say you are not the Christ or Elijah or the Prophet. Why then do you baptize people?
John answered them and said: I baptize people with water. But there is someone here with you that you don’t know.
This is the One I told you about: After me comes a man who is superior to me, because He lived long before I was born. I am not good enough to take off his sandals.
These things all happened at Bethany on the other side of the Jordan River. This is where John was baptizing people.
The next day John saw Jesus coming to him, and John said: Look, there is the Lamb of God that takes away the sin of the world.
This is the Man that I told you about when I said there is someone that comes after me who is superior to me, because He existed before me. He lived long before I was born.
I did not know who he was. But I came baptizing people with water so that Israel could know that He is the Messiah.
John said: I saw the Spirit come down from heaven like a dove and rest on Jesus.

Before this, I did not know who He was, but God sent me to baptize with water. God told me: when you see the Spirit come down and stay on a Person, then you must know that He is the One who will baptize people with the Holy Spirit.
I have seen it and I tell you: This Man is the Son of God.
The next day John and 2 of his disciples were there again.
John saw Jesus walking by and John said: Look, there is the Lamb of God.
The 2 disciples of John heard what Jesus said, then they started to follow Jesus.

Jesus looked back and He saw them following Him. Jesus asked John disciples: What do you want? Johns’ disciples answered, Rabbi, where do You stay? (A Rabbi is someone who teaches people how to serve God).

Jesus said to Johns’ disciples Come and you will see. They went with Jesus and they saw the place where He stayed. Johns’ disciples stayed with Jesus all day. It was about the 10th hour (4 o’clock in the afternoon)
These men who followed Jesus after they had heard about him from John. One of them was Andrew, the brother of Simon Peter
The first thing Andrew did was to go and find his brother Simon. Andrew said to him, we have found the Messiah which means The Christ.
Then Andrew brought Simon to Jesus. Jesus looked at him and said, you are Simon, the son of Jona. You will be called Cephas, which means a stone.
The next day Jesus decided to go to Galilee. He saw Philip and said to him: Follow Me.
Philip lived in the town of Bethsaida, in the same town where Andrew and Peter lived.
Philip saw Nathanael and said to him: We have found the Man that Moses and the prophets wrote about. His name is Jesus. He is the son of Joseph, and He comes from the town of Nazareth.
Nathanael said to Philip, Nazareth! Can anything good come from Nazareth? Philip said come and see.
When Jesus saw Nathanael coming, He said: This man is a true Israelite. He can be trust.
Nathanael asked Jesus: How do you know that? Do you know me? Jesus said to him: I saw you when you were under the fig tree before Philip told you about me.
Nathanael said to Jesus: Teacher, you are the Son of God. You are the King of Israel.
Jesus said to him: You believe in Me because I told you that I saw you under the fig tree, but you will see much more wonderful things than that.
Jesus also said: I tell you this and it is true: You will see heaven open and the angels of God going up to Him and coming down on Me, the Son of man.
On the 3rd days there was a wedding in the town of Cana in Galilee. Jesus’ mother was there.
The people also invited Jesus and his disciples to the wedding.
At the wedding there was not enough wine, so Jesus’ mother said to him, They have no more wine.
Jesus said to her: Dear woman, why do you tell Me this? My time has not come yet.
Jesus’ mother said to the servants: You must do what Jesus tells you to do.
There were 6 stone waterpots. The Jews used the water in these pots to wash and purify themselves. each waterpot holding from twenty to thirty gallons.
Jesus told the servants to fill the barrels with water. The servants filled them to the top.
Then Jesus told them: Now fill the cups with water and give it to the man in charge of the feast.
Then the man in charge tasted it, but the water had become wine. He did not know where the wine had come from, but the servants who brought the water knew. Then he called the bridegroom to come.
The man in charge said: People always give their guests the best wine first, and when everyone is drunk, then they give them the wine that is not so good. But you have kept the best wine until now.
This was Jesus’ first miracle. He did it in the town of Cana in Galilee. There Jesus showed the people that He was God and his disciples believed in Him.
Then Jesus, his mother, his brothers and his disciples went to the town of Capernaum for a few days.
It was near the time of the Jewish Passover and Jesus went to Jerusalem.
At the temple He saw people who were selling cattle, sheep and doves. He saw others sitting at tables, exchanging and trading people’s money.
Jesus took some rope and He made a whip. Then He chased all of them out of the temple, and also the sheep and cattle. Jesus poured out their money and turned over the tables of the money traders.
Jesus said to the people who sold doves: Take these things out of here. Do not make my Father’s house a place for buying and selling.
And Jesus disciples remembered the Old Testament it is written: My strong devotion to your Temple will destroy me.
The Jews said to Jesus: Show us a miracle as a sign from God that prove that you have the right to do these things.
Jesus said to them: Destroy this temple and I will build it again in 3 days.
The Jews said: People have worked for 46 years to build this temple. And You say You can build it in 3 days?
But Jesus was talking about his own body when He talked about the temple.
Later, after Jesus died and He lived again, the disciples remembered the words that He had said. Then they believed in the scriptures and the words that Jesus had said.
Jesus was in Jerusalem for the Passover. Many people saw the miracles that Jesus did, and they believed in Him.
But Jesus didn’t trust them, because he knew all about people.
He did not need anyone to tell him what a person was like. He already knew.
There was a Pharisee. His name was Nicodemus. Nicodemus was a leader of the Jews.
Nicodemus came to Jesus in the night and said to Jesus: Teacher, we know that you are a teacher sent from God. No one can do these miracles that you do unless they have God’s help.
Jesus answered Nicodemus: I tell you this is true: Anyone who is not born again cannot be in God’s kingdom.
Nicodemus asked Jesus: But how can a person be born again when he is old? Can he go back into his mother’s womb and be born a second time?
Jesus said to Nicodemus: I tell you this is true: A person must be born from water and from the Spirit. He cannot enter God’s Kingdom
Humans can only give birth to human life, but the Holy Spirit gives birth to spiritual life.
Do not be surprised when I say you must be born again.
The wind blows where it wants to blow. You can hear and see the wind blow, but you do not know where it comes from and where it goes. It is the same with someone who is born of the Spirit of God.’
Nicodemus asked Jesus: How can this happen?
Jesus said: Nicodemus, you are a teacher of the Israelites? and you don’t understand these things?
I tell you this and it is true: We talk about what we know. We tell about what we have seen. But you people don’t accept what we tell you
If I told you about something that has happened on earth, and you do not believe it. So, I’m sure you will not believe me if I tell you about heavenly things!
No person has ever gone up to heaven. Only I, the Son of man, have done that, and I also came down from heaven.
As Moses lifted up the serpent in the desert. The same with the Son of Man. He must be lifted up too.
Everyone who believes in Jesus, the Son on man, will not be destroyed but have eternal life.
Yes, God loved the world so much that he gave his one and only Son, so that everyone who believes in him would not be destroyed but have eternal life.
God sent not his Son into the world to judge the world guilty, but to save the world through him.
People who believe in God’s Son, Jesus, is not judged guilty. But people who do not believe are already judged guilty, because they have not believed in God’s only Son.
People are judge guilt by this fact: The light has come into this world, but the people loved the darkness, not the light, for their works were evil.
People who do bad things do not love the light. They do not come into the light for fear that his sinful ways will be seen and rebuked.
People who believeth the truth comes to the light. Then the light will show that whatever they have done was done through God.
After this, Jesus and his disciples went to the area of Judea. There Jesus spent time with his disciples and people were baptized.
John was also baptizing people in a town called Aenon near Salim, because there was a lot of water there. The people came to John and he baptized them.
This was before John was put in jail.
Then a debate started with the disciples of John with a certain Jew about purification.

They went to John and told him: Teacher, the Man who was with you on the other side of the Jordan River, the Man, Jesus, you told us about, is now baptizing people and all the people are going to Him.
John replied, A man can receive only what is given him from heaven.
You yourselves heard me say, I am not the Christ. I am only the one God sent to prepare the way for him.
At a wedding it is the bridegroom who gets the bride. The bridegroom’s friend is simply glad to stand with him and hear his vows. Therefore, I am filled with joy at Jesus success.
Jesus must become more important, and I must become unimportant.

Jesus came from heaven, and He is more important than everyone. Someone who comes from the world belongs to the world, and he talks about things of the world. Someone who comes from heaven is more important than anyone on earth.
Jesus talks about the things that He has saw and heard, but people do not accept what he says.
Anyone who believes what Jesus says identifies themselves with God’s truth.
God sent Jesus to tells people what God has says, God gave the Spirit to Jesus without limit.
The Father, God, loves the Son, Jesus, and has given him power over everything.
Anyone who believes in the Son, Jesus, has eternal life. But anyone who does not believe in the Son, Jesus, will not have life. They cannot get away from God’s anger.
Jesus knew that the Pharisees had heard the report that Jesus was making and baptizing more disciples than John.
It was not Jesus who baptized the people. It was Jesus disciples who baptized.
Then Jesus left the land of Judea and He went back to Galilee.
On the way to Galilee, Jesus had to go through the country of Samaria.

In Samaria Jesus came to the town called Sychar. Sychar was near the field that Jacob gave to his son Joseph. John 4: 6 Jacob’s water well was there. Jesus was tired from his long trip, so he sat down on the well edge. It was about noon time.
A woman from Samaria came to get water and Jesus asked her: Give me some water to drink.
Jesus was alone because his disciples had gone into the town to buy food.
The Samaritan woman said to Jesus: You are a Jew and I am a woman of Samaria. Why do You ask me for a drink of water? She said the Jews have nothing to do with Samaritans

Jesus said to the Samaritan woman: If you knew about God’s gift of eternal life, and who it is who says, Give Me a drink, you would have asked Him to give you to drink, and He would have given you living water of eternal life.
The Samaritan woman said, Sir, where will you get that living water? The well is very deep, and you have nothing to get water with.
You are better than our grandfather Jacob. Jacob and his sons and his animals drank the water then he gave this water-well to us.
Jesus said to her: Anyone who drinks the water from this water-well will become thirsty again.
But when someone drinks the water that I give him, he will never be thirsty again. The water 0that I give will be like a fountain inside of him that gives eternal life.
The Samaritan woman said to Jesus: Sir, give me some of that water. Then I will not become thirsty again and I will not have to come here again to get water.

Jesus said to the Samaritan woman: Go and call your husband and come back here. John 4 17 The Samaritan woman said to Jesus: I do not have a husband. And Jesus said: You are right to say you have no husband when you said I do not have a husband.
That because, you have had 5 husbands and the man you live with now is not your husband. You speak the truth.
The Samaritan woman said to Jesus: Sir, I see you are a prophet.
Our grandfathers worshipped God on this mountain, but you Jews say Jerusalem is the right place where we must worship God.
Jesus said to the Samaritan woman: Woman, believe Me, there will come a time when people worship the Father, but not on this mountain or in Jerusalem.
You Samaritans worship God, but you do not know Him. We Jews know God because he is the Saviour of the Jews.
I said there will come a time and that time is here now. When the true worshipers will worship the Father in spirit and truth. And these are the kind of people the Father wants to be his worshipers.
God is spirit. So the people who worship him must worship in spirit and truth
The Samaritan woman said: I know the Messiah will come. He is the Christ. When he comes, he will explain everything to us.
Jesus said to the Samaritan Woman: I am that One, the Messiah, and I am speaking to you now.
Jesus’ disciples came back. They saw Jesus talking to the Samaritan woman and they were surprised. But not one of them asked Jesus what He wanted from her or why He was talking to her?
The Samaritan woman put down her water pot and left it there and she went into the town. She called the people and said:
You must come and see. There is a Man who told me everything that I have done. I think maybe He is the Christ.
The people of the town went to where Jesus was.
While the woman was in town, Jesus’ followers were begging him, Teacher, eat something.
But Jesus said to them: I have food to eat, but you do not know that kind of food.
The disciples asked each other: Did someone bring Him some food?
Jesus said, My food is to do what the Father has sent me to do, and to finish the work that my father has told me to do.
When you plant, you always say, Four more months to wait before we gather the grain. But I tell you, open your eyes, and look at the fields. They are ready for harvesting now
The people who gather the wheat will get paid. They are gathering crops for eternal life. The people who sow and the people who gather the wheat will be happy together.
It is true what people say: One person sows the wheat and another person comes and gathers it.
I sent you to gather a crop that you did not work for. Others did the work, and you will get the profit from their work.
Many of the Samaritans in that town believe in Jesus because the Samaritan woman told them that Jesus had told her everything she had done.
Then the Samaritans came to Jesus and they asked Him to stay with them, so Jesus stayed there for 2 more days.
Many more Samaritans believe in Jesus when they heard the things He said.
The people of the town said to the Samaritan woman: We first believed because you told us about Jesus. But now we have listened to Him ourselves. Now we know that He is the Saviour of the world.
2 days later Jesus left and went to Galilee.
Jesus said: Other people listen to a prophet, but his own people do not think he is important.
When Jesus arrived in Galilee, the people of Galilee welcomed him. The people of Galilee had been at the Passover festival in Jerusalem and had seen everything Jesus did there.
Jesus went back to the town of Cana in Galilee. This is where Jesus had changed water into wine. There was an official whose son was ill in the town of Capernaum.
The people told the officer that Jesus had come from Judea to Galilee. The officer went to Jesus and begged Jesus to come to Capernaum to heal his son because his son was very sick and soon will die.
Jesus said to the officer: You always want to see signs and miracles. If you do not see signs and miracles, you will not believe.
The officer said to Jesus: Please come to my child quickly before he dies.
Jesus said to him: You may go home. Your son will not die. The officer believed what Jesus said to him and he went home.
As the officer went home, his servants came to him. They told him that his child was well.
The officer asked his servants what time the child had got better and they said: Yesterday afternoon at the 7th hour (one o’clock) the fever was gone.
The father then remembered that it was at that time when Jesus said to him: Your son will not die. The officer and his family then believe in Jesus.
This was the 2nd miracle that Jesus did in the town of Cana after He went from Judea to Galilee
There was a Jewish feast and Jesus went to Jerusalem.
In Jerusalem at the Sheep Gate is a pool. The Hebrew name of the pool is called Bethesda. At the pool there were 5 porches.
A lot of sick people were lying near the pool. Some of them were blind, some were crippled, and some had body parts that were withered. They were by the pool waiting for the water to move.
And an angel went to the pool of Bethesda form time to time. The angel would move the water. The 1st person that went into the pool after the moving of the water, was healed from his sickness.
Near the pool of Bethesda was a man who had been sick for 38 years.
Jesus saw the man lying there and Jesus knew that the man had been sick for a long time. Then Jesus asked him: Do you want to be healed?

The sick man said to Jesus: I do not have anyone to help me, to put me into the water when the water starts moving. Every time the water starts moving, I try to get in, but other people always get in before me.
Jesus said to him: Stand up, Pick up your mat, and walk
At that moment the sick man was healed. He took his mat and he walked. This happened on a Sabbath day.
When the Jews saw the man who was healed carrying his mat, they said to him: This is the Sabbath day. You may not carry your mat on the Sabbath day.
The man that was healed said to the Jews: The Man who healed me said I must take my mat and walk.
The Jews asked the man who was healed: Who is the Man that told you to take your mat and walk?
The man who was healed did not know who had healed him because Jesus was no longer there. He had gone away because there were too many people.
Later, Jesus found the man who was healed at the Temple and said to him, See, you are well now. Stop sinning or something worse may happen to you.
Then the man who was healed went to the Jews who asked him who told you to take up your bed and walk. The man told them that it was Jesus who had healed him.
Because Jesus was doing these things on the Sabbath, the Jewish leaders began to cause trouble for Jesus and even try to find ways to kill Jesus.
Jesus said to them: My Father has not stopped working and this is why I keep on working.
The Jews then tried to kill Jesus. They wanted to kill Him because Jesus had broken the law of the Sabbath day and also because Jesus had said that God was his Father, making himself equal with God!

Jesus said to the Jews: I tell you this and it is true: I am the Son but I can not do anything on my own. The Son only does what he sees his Father doing. The Son does the same things that the Father does.
The Father loves the Son, and the Father shows the Son everything that He does. I, the Son, will do more wonderful things, than healing a sick man you will be amazed.
The Father gives life to dead people so that they can live again. I, the Son, do the same. I gives life to those I wants to.
The Father does not judge anyone. He said that I, the Son, must judge people.
Everyone should honour the Son as they honour the Father. If someone does not honour the Son, then he does not honour the Father.

Jesus said this and it is true: Everyone who listens to what the Son, say, and believes in God who has sent Me, has eternal life. They are not judge guilty of sin. They no more spiritual dead but have entered into life

I tell you this and it is true: The time will come, and it is already here when people who are spiritually dead will hear the Son of God speaking to them. Everyone who listens to the Son and believes will live spiritually.
Life comes from the Father himself. So the Father has also given the Son life.
The Father has given the Son the power to judge all people because he is the Son of Man.
Don’t be surprised when I say this: There will come a time when all the people who are dead and, in their graves, will hear The Son’s voice.

Then they will come out of their graves. Those who believed on the Son, The Lord Jesus Christ as Saviour, will rise and have eternal life. But those who did not believe on the Son, The Lord Jesus Christ for salvation, will rise to be judged guilty.

I, the Son, can not do nothing alone. I listen to what the Father says to Me and then I judge people. My judgement is right because it is not I who decide what to do. I just do what my Father wants Me to do.
Jesus said to the Jews: If I tell people about myself, they cannot be sure that what I said is true.
But there is someone else who tells people about me, and I know that what he says about me is true.
You sent people to John the Baptist and he told the truth about Me.
I don’t need anyone to tell people about me, but I remind you of what John said so that you can be saved.
John was like a burning light that shone brightly and you were happy to enjoy his light for a short time.
I, Jesus, have a proof about myself that is greater than what John said. The things I do are the things my Father has given me to do. The things I do show that the Father has sent me.
The Father who has sent Me also said who I am, but you have never heard the Father speaking to you and you have never seen his face.
The Father’s teaching does not live in you, because you don’t believe in the one the Father sent.
You have carefully studied the Scriptures. You think that they give you eternal life. These same Scriptures talk about me!
But you don’t want to come to Me, the Son, to find eternal life.
I, Jesus, do not receive glory and approval from men.
But I, Jesus, know you, and I, Jesus, know that you do not have the love of God in your hearts.
I have come from my Father and speak for him, but you do not accept me. But when other people come speaking only for themselves, you accept them
You like to have praise from each other. But you never try to get the praise that comes from God only. So how can you believe?
Don’t think that I, Jesus, will accuse you before the Father and say what you have done wrong. Moses is the one to accuse you. And he is the one you hoped would save you.
If you really believed Moses, you would believe me, Jesus, because he wrote about me.
If you do not believe what Moses wrote, then you will not believe what I say.
Jesus went to the other side of Lake Galilee. The other name of the lake is Lake Tiberias.
A lot of people went with Jesus because they saw the miracles that Jesus did when Jesus healed the sick people.
Jesus went up a mountain side and Jesus sat with his disciples.
It was just before the time of the Jewish feast of the Passover.
When Jesus saw all the people who came to Him, Jesus asked Philip: Where can we get enough bread to give all these people to eat?
Jesus said this because He wanted to see what Philip would do, but Jesus already knew what He was going to do.
Philip said to Jesus: If we want to give each person just a small piece of bread, we will need more than 200 silver coins to buy the bread.
One of the disciples, Simon-Peter’s brother, Andrew, said to Jesus:
Here is a boy with 5 loaves of barley bread and 2 fish, but this is too little for so many people.
Jesus said to his disciples: Tell the people to sit down. There was lots of grass for the people to sit on. There were many people. The men were about 5 000.

Then Jesus took the bread. He prayed and thanked God for the bread and He gave it to the people who were sitting there. He also gave them fish to eat. There was a lot of food and everyone had enough to eat.
When all the people had had enough food to eat, Jesus said to his disciples: You must pick up all the food that the people did not eat. We must not waste any food.
The disciples picked up all the pieces of food. There were 12 baskets full after the people had eaten of the 5 loaves of barley bread.
The people saw Jesus miracle of the 5 loaves of barley bread and 2 small fish. The people said: Now we know that Jesus is the Prophet whom we are waiting for to come to the world.
The people wanted to grab Jesus and make Him King. But when Jesus saw this, Jesus went away and went up the mountain to be alone.
That evening Jesus’ disciples were on a boat on the lake.
They wanted to go over the lake to the town of Capernaum. It was dark and Jesus had not come to them.
A very strong wind was blowing and the waves on the lake were big.
The disciples had rowed the boat for about 25 or 30 stadioi when they saw Jesus. He was walking on the water and He came to the boat. The disciples were afraid
but Jesus said to them: ‘Don’t be afraid. It is I.
The disciples asked Jesus to get into the boat, and then immediately the boat was at Capernaum, at the land where they wanted to go.
The next day the people on the other side of the lake saw that there was only one boat. They knew Jesus had not gone with his disciples in their boat. The disciples had gone away on their own.
There were other boats from Tiberias that came to the place where the people ate the bread after the Lord Jesus had prayed to God and thanked Him.
When the people saw that Jesus and his disciples were not there, they got into their boats and went to the town of Capernaum looking for Jesus.
The people saw Jesus in the town of Capernaum and they asked Him: ‘Rabbi, when did You come here?’
Jesus told them: ‘I tell you this and it is sure: You are looking for Me, not because you saw the miracles and signs that I have done, but because you ate enough food and now you want more food.

You must not work just to get the food of this world that gets old and goes bad. You must do everything to get food that never goes bad and gives eternal life. I, the Son of man, will give you this food of life. I can do it, because God the Father told Me to do it.’
Then the people asked Jesus: ‘What must we do? What does God want us to do?’
Jesus said to them: ‘If you want to do what God wants, then you must believe in Me, because God has sent Me to the world.’
Then the people asked Jesus: ‘What sign can You show us so that we can see and believe in You? What will You do?
When our forefathers were in the desert, God gave them manna to eat. In the Old Testament it is written: “He gave them bread from heaven to eat.” ’

Jesus said to them: ‘I tell you this and it is true: You think that it was Moses who gave you the bread that came from heaven. No, it is my Father who gives you bread, real bread from heaven that He gives you now.
The bread that God gives is the One who comes from heaven to give people of the world the real life
The people asked Jesus: Teacher, give us some of this bread now and forever.
Jesus said to them: I am the bread that gives life. Everyone who comes to Me will never be spiritually hungry. Everyone who believes in Me will never be spiritually thirsty.
I, Jesus have told you: You see what I do, but you do not believe in Me.
Everyone that the Father gives to Me will come to Me, and I will never say no to someone who comes to Me. I will never send him away.
I came from heaven, I do not do what I want to do, but i do what the Father wants Me to do, because it is the Father who has sent Me.
And this is the Father’s will which hath sent me, that of all which he hath given me I should lose nothing, but should raise it up again at the last day.
My Father wants everyone to look at Me and to believe in Me, the Son, and have eternal life. I will raise them up on the last day.
When Jesus said that He is the bread from heaven, the Jews were very unhappy and they started to complain about Jesus.
They said to each other: ‘Jesus is the son of Joseph. We know his father and mother. He lies when He says that He comes from heaven.’
Jesus said to them: ‘Don’t complain about what I said.
My Father has sent Me to the world. No one can come to Me if the Father does not bring that person to Me, and I will give life to that person on the last day.
One of the prophets in the Old Testament wrote: God will teach all of them. This means that everyone who listens to the Father and learns from Him will come to Me.
This does not mean that someone else also saw the Father. I am the only One who has seen the Father because I come from God.
I, Jesus tell you this and it is true: Any person who believes in Me, Jesus will live forever.
I, Jesus am the bread that gives eternal life.
Your fathers had manna to eat in the desert, but later they all died.
But the real bread that comes from heaven is different. Everyone who eats this bread will never die.

I, Jesus am the bread who lives and comes from heaven. If anyone eats this bread, he will live forever. The bread that I, Jesus give is my body. I, Jesus give it to all the people of the world so that they can live forever.
When the Jews heard this, they started to argue and said: How can He give us his body to eat?
Jesus said to them: I tell you this and it is true: I am the Son of man. If you do not eat the body of the Son of man and drink his blood, then you will not have eternal life.
Every person who eats my body and drinks my blood will have eternal life, and I will make him stand up and live on the last day.
For My flesh is true spiritual food, and My blood is true spiritual drink.
Someone who eats my body and drinks my blood must know that I live in him and he lives in Me.
The Father lives, The father has sent Me and I live because He gave Me life. It is the same for people who eat my body. I give them eternal life.

The real bread that comes down from heaven is not the same as the manna that your fathers ate in the desert. Those people did not live forever. They died. But everyone who eats this real bread from heaven will live forever.’
Jesus was in the synagogue in Capernaum when He talked about the bread from heaven.
A lot of the followers of Jesus heard what He said about the bread from heaven and they said: ‘The things that Jesus says are too difficult to understand. We do not want to listen to this.’
Jesus knew that his disciples were complaining. He asked them: Is this teaching a problem for you?
What will you say when you see Me, the Son of man, go back to heaven where I was before?
It is the Spirit that gives life. The body is of no value for that. But the things I have told you are from the Spirit, so they give life
But some of you do not want to believe in Me. Jesus knew from the beginning who would not believe in Him. He also knew from the beginning who the one was who would betray Him.
Then Jesus said: ‘This is why I told you that no person can come to Me if the Father does not bring him to Me.’
After this a lot of people who had followed Jesus stopped following Him. They did not want to go with Him anymore.
Then Jesus asked his 12 disciples: ‘And you? Do you also want to go away?’
Simon-Peter said to Jesus: No, Lord, there is no one to whom we can go. You have the words that give eternal life.
We believe and know that You are the holy One who came from God.
Jesus said to them: I have chosen 12 of you to be my disciples, but one of you is a devil.
Jesus was talking about Judas, the son of Simon Iscariot. (Judas was one of the disciples of Jesus but later he betrayed Jesus).
Jesus went to many places in the country of Galilee. Jesus did not want to travel in Judea, because the Jews there wanted to kill Him.
It was near the time of the Jewish Feast of tabernacles (tents).
Jesus’ brothers said to Him: ‘You must go to Judea, and then your disciples can see what miracles You do
It does not help when You do something but no one can see it, because then no one will know who You are. You must do these miracles so that all the people can see it is You who are doing them.
Jesus’ brothers said this because even they did not believe in him.
Jesus said to them: ‘It is not the right time for Me to go. But any time is right for you.
Jesus said, you can go to the feast. I will not go because it is not the right time for Me to go now.
After Jesus had talked to his brothers, He stayed in Galilee.
Sometime after Jesus’ brothers went to the feast, Jesus decided to go to the feast, but He did not want the people to know that He was there.
At the feast the Jews were looking for Jesus. They asked: ‘Where is that Man?’
The people talked a lot about Jesus. Some people said Jesus was a good Man and other people said Jesus was not good. They said Jesus lies to the people.
But no one was brave enough to talk about Jesus openly. They were afraid of the Jewish leaders.
On the 4th day of the feast Jesus went to the temple and He started to teach the people.
The Jews were amazed when they heard Jesus. They said: How does Jesus know so many things? No one has taught Him.
Jesus told them: The things that I teach you do not come from Me. They come from God who has sent Me to the world.
Anyone who really wants to do what God wants, will know that the things I teach come from God. He will know that this teaching does not come from Me.

A person who teaches people things that come from himself wants people to think that he is important. This is not what I do. I want people to know that God, who sent Me to the world, is important. That is why people can believe Me and know that I do not lie.
Moses gave you the laws but not one of you listens and does what the laws say. Why do you want to kill Me?
The people said to Jesus: A demon is making you crazy! No one is trying to kill You.
Jesus said to them: I did one miracle on a Sabbath day, and you were all surprised.
But you work on the Sabbath, too, when you obey Moses’ law of circumcision. (Actually, this tradition of circumcision began with your grandfathers, long before the law of Moses.)
You circumcise boys on the Sabbath day to obey the laws of Moses. Why are you angry with Me when I heal a man’s whole body on the Sabbath day?
Stop judging by the way things look. Be fair and judge by what is really right.
Some of the people in Jerusalem said: ‘There is the Man that the leaders want to kill.
Jesus speaks bodly to all the people and no one is arguing with Him or saying that He is wrong. Maybe the leaders think that He is the Christ.

But this Man can not be Christ, because we know where He comes from and when Christ comes, no one will know where He comes from. John 7: 28 Jesus was still teaching in the Temple area when he said loudly, Do you really know me and where I am from? I am here, but not by my own decision. I was sent by one who is very real. But you don’t know him.
I know God because I come from Him. He is the One who has sent Me.
When Jesus said this, the people tried to grab him. But no one was able even to touch him, because the right time for him had not yet come.
A lot of people believe in Jesus. They said: When Christ comes, He will not do more miracles than this Man.
When the Pharisees heard what the people said about Jesus, they and the chief priests sent guards to Jesus to arrest Him.
Jesus told them: I will stay with you for a short while, then I will go back to God who has sent Me to the world.
Then you will look for Me but you will not find Me. You can not go to the place where I am going.
Then the Jews said to each other: Where will Jesus go where we can not find Him? Is Jesus going to the Gentiles to teach them?
What does Jesus mean when Jesus says we will look for Him but we will not find Him? Why can’t we go to the place where Jesus is going?
The last day of the feast was the most important day. Jesus stood up and said loudly: Whoever is thirsty may come to me and believe
It will be like it is written in the Old Testament: If someone believes in Me, Son of God, rivers of living water will flow out from their heart.
Jesus was talking about the Spirit. The Spirit had not yet been given to people, because Jesus had not yet been raised to glory. But later, those who believed in Jesus would receive the Spirit.
Many of the people heard the words that Jesus said and they said: This man is really the Prophet that we are waiting for.
Other people said: He is the Christ. But some other people said: No, The Christ will not come from Galilee
In the Old Testament it is written that the Messiah will be from the family of King David. It is also written that the Messiah will be born in Bethlehem, the town where David lived.
And the people argued about Jesus.
Some of them wanted to arrest Him, but no one tried to do it.
The guards went back to the chief priests and Pharisees. The priest and the Pharisees asked the guards: Why didn’t you bring Jesus here?
The guards answered and said: We have never heard any person speak like Jesus speaks.
The Pharisees asked the guards: Have you also started to believe the lies that Jesus tells?
Not one of the chief priests or the Pharisees believes in Jesus.
But those people out there know nothing about the law. They are under God’s curse!”
Nicodemus was one of the Pharisees. It was he who came to talk to Jesus one night. He said to the Pharisees and the chief priests:
Our laws say we must first listen to a person and find out everything that he did, then we can judge him.
The Pharisees said to Nicodemus: You speak like someone who comes from Galilee. Go and read the Old Testament and you will see that no prophet ever came out of Galilee.
Then all the people went to their homes.
Jesus went to the Mount of Olives.
Early the next morning Jesus came back to the temple. The people all came to him, and he sat and taught them.
The teachers of the law and the Pharisees brought a woman who had been caught in adultery to Jesus. The teachers of the law and the Pharisees made the woman stand in the center of the court,

The teachers of the law and the Pharisees were saying this to trick Jesus. They wanted to catch him saying something wrong so that they could have a charge against him. But Jesus ignored them and stooped down and started writing on the ground with his finger

The teachers of the law and the Pharisees asked Jesus again what He thought they must do. Then Jesus stood up and He said to them: ‘If there is any one of you who has never done anything wrong, he can throw the first stone at her
Jesus bowed down and wrote on the ground again.
Jesus stood up and He asked her: where did they all go? Did no one judge you guilty?
She said: No, Lord, there is no one. Jesus said to her: I will also not judge you. You may go, but you must not sin again.
Jesus started to teach the people again. Jesus said: I am the light for the people of the world. Any person who follows Me will not walk in the dark. He will have the light that brings life.
The Pharisees said to Jesus: When you talk about yourself, you are the only one to say that these things are true. So, we cannot accept what you say.
Jesus said to them: ‘Yes, I talk about Myself but what I say about Myself is true, because I know where I came from and where I am going. But you don’t know where I came from or where I am going.
You look at the outside of people and then you judge people. I don’t judge anyone.
But if I judge people, my judging is true, because when I judge I am not alone. The Father who sent me is with me.
Jesus said, In your laws it is written that when 2 people say the same about someone, it is true.
And there are 2 who say the same things about Me. Both I and the Father who has sent Me to the world say the same things.’
The Pharisees asked Jesus: ‘Where is your Father?’ Jesus said: ‘You don’t know Me and you don’t know my Father. But if you knew me, you would know my Father too
Jesus said all these things in the temple. He was standing near the offering-box where He was teaching people. No one tried to arrest Him because it was not the right time for that to happen.
Jesus talked to The Pharisees again. Jesus said: I will leave you. You will look for me, but you will die in your sin. You cannot come where I am going.”
The Pharisees said: Jesus says we can not go where He is going. Is Jesus going to kill Himself? Is that why he said, You cannot come where I am going?
Jesus said to The Pharisees: You come from the world, but I come from heaven. Yes, you are people of this world, but I am not from this world.
Jesus said, I told you that you would die in your sins. Yes, if you don’t believe that I Am, you will die in your sins.
The Pharisees asked Jesus: Who are You? Jesus said to The Pharisees: I have told you who I am from the beginning, and that is who I am.
Jesus said, I have much more I could say to judge you. But I tell people only what I have heard from the one who sent me, and he speaks the truth.
The Jews did not understand that Jesus talked about the Father in heaven.

Jesus said to The Pharisees: You will lift up the Son of Man on the cross. Then you will know that I Am. You will know that whatever I do is not by my own authority. You will know that I say only what the Father has taught me.
The Father who has sent Me to the world will not leave Me alone. The Father is always with Me, because I always do the things that please the Father.
While Jesus was saying these things, a lot of people started to believe in Him.
Jesus said to the Jews leaders who believed in Him: If you believe in Me and you do what I say, then you really are my disciples.
Then you must know the truth and the truth will set you free.
The Pharisees said to Jesus: We are the family of Abraham. We have never been slaves. We are free. Why do You say we will become free?
Jesus said to them: I tell you this and it is sure: If a person sins, then he is a slave to sin.
A slave does not always stay with the family, but a son always stays in the family.
If I, the Son, set you free, then you will really be free.
I know you are the descendants of Abraham, but you want to kill Me because you do not want to believe what I say.
I tell you what my Father has shown Me. You do what your father has shown you.
The Jews said to Jesus: Abraham is our father. Jesus said to them: If you are sons of Abraham, then you will do what Abraham did
But now you want to kill Me because I tell the truth that God has told Me. Abraham did not do anything like that
You are doing what your own father did. The Jews said to Jesus: We are not like children who never knew who their father was. God is our Father. He is the only Father we have
Jesus said to the Jews: God is not your Father because you do not love Me. I came from God, and I am here with you. I did not decide to come. No, it was God who sent Me to the world
Why don’t you understand what I am telling you? It is because you do not really want to listen to what I am saying.

Your father is the devil. You belong to him. You want to do what he wants. He was a murderer from the beginning. He was always against the truth. There is no truth in him. He is like the lies he tells. Yes, the devil is a liar. He is the father of lies.
I am telling you the truth, and you don’t believe me
Not one of you can show that I have sinned or done something wrong. Why don’t you believe Me when I tell the truth?
Anyone who belongs to God listens to what God says. But you do not listen to what God says because you do not belong to Him.
The Jews said to Jesus: We were right when we said that You are a Samaritan and that You have a demon in You that makes You speak like this.
Jesus said: No, there is not a demon in Me. I honour my Father, but you don’t honour Me.
I am not trying to get honor for myself. There is one who wants this honor for me. He is the judge.
I tell you the truth, whoever continues to obey my teaching will never die

Then the Jews said to Jesus: Now we know that there is a demon in You who makes You say this. Abraham has died and the prophets have died. But now You say if someone does what You say, he will not die forever.
Jesus? Do you think you are greater than our father Abraham? He died, and so did the prophets. Who do you think you are?
Jesus answered, If I give honor to myself, that honor is worth nothing. The one who gives me honor is my Father. And you say that he is your God
But you do not know the Father. I know Him. If I say I do not know the Father, then I do not speak the truth, and then I will be like you. No, I know the Father and I do what He says
Your father Abraham was very happy that he would see the day when I came. Abraham saw that day and was happy.
The Jews said to Jesus, “What? How can you say you have seen Abraham? You are young. You are not even 50 years old!
Jesus said to them: ‘I tell you this and it is true: I am God. I was alive even before Abraham lived.
When Jesus said this, the Jewish leaders picked up stones to throw at Jesus. But Jesus hid, and then Jesus left the Temple area.
Jesus walked on and Jesus saw a blind man. The blind man had been blind from the day that he was born.
The disciples asked Jesus: Master, why was this man born blind? Whose fault was it? Was it the blind man who sinned or was it his father or mother who sinned?
Jesus answered, “It was not any sin of this man or his parents that caused him to be blind. He was born blind so that he could be used to show what great things God can do.
While it is daytime, we must continue doing the work of the one who sent me. The night is coming, and no one can work at night
While I am with the people in the world, I am the light for the people.
After Jesus said this, he spit on the dirt, made some mud and put it on the man’s eyes.
Jesus said to him: Go and wash your eyes in the Siloam Pool. (The name Siloam means ‘God has sent someone.) The blind man went, and he washed himself. When he came back, he could see.
Blind man’s neighbors and some others who had seen him blind man, Is this the same man who was a beggar?
Some people said: Yes, it is he. Other people said: No, it is someone else who looks like the blind man. Then the blind man said: Yes, it is I.

The people asked the once blind man: What happened that you can see now? John 9: 11 The once blind man said: A Man whose name is Jesus made mud and Jesus put it on my eyes. Then Jesus told me to go to the Siloam Pool and wash it off. I did what Jesus said and then I could see. John 9: 12 They asked the once blind man: Where is that Man? The one blind man said: I don’t know.
The people took the man who had been blind to the Pharisees
It was on a Sabbath day when Jesus made the clay and healed the blind man.
So the Pharisees asked the man who once was blind again, How did you get your sight? The once blind man answered, Jesus put clay on my eyes. I washed, and now I can see.

Some Pharisees said: This Man does not come from God because He works on the Sabbath day. Other Pharisees said: Any person who does miracles like this cannot be a sinner.’ The Pharisees argued with each other.
Then the Pharisees asked the man who had been blind: What do you think of the Man who healed your eyes? The man who had been blind said: I think He is a prophet.
The Jewish leaders did not want to believe that the man had been blind and that he now could see. Then they called the parents of the man who could now see
and the Jewish leaders asked blind man’s parents: Is this man your son? Is it true that he was blind when he was born? Why can he now see?
The blind man’s parents said: ‘We know that he is our son. We know he was blind when he was born.
But we don’t know why he can see now. We don’t know who healed his eyes. Ask him. He is old enough to answer for himself

The man’s parents said this because they were afraid of the Jewish leaders. The leaders had already said that if someone said he believed that Jesus was the Christ, then that person could never again go into the synagogue.
That is why his parents said, He is old enough. Ask him.
The Jewish leaders called the man who had been blind again and they said to him: Promise and say God is your Witness and speak the truth. We know that this Man is a sinner.
The once blind man said: ‘I do not know if this man is a sinner, but I know that I was blind and now I can see.
The Jewish leaders asked the once blind man: What did Jesus do for you? How did He heal your eyes?
The man said to them: I have already told you but you did not listen. Why do you want me to tell it again? Do you also want to become disciples of Jesus?
The Jewishd leaders became angry and said: You are a disciple of that Man. We are disciples of Moses
We know that God spoke to Moses, but we don’t know where this Man comes from.
The man who had been blind said to them: This is really strange! You don’t know where he comes from, but he healed my eyes.
We know that God does not listen to sinners. God listens to people who serve Him and do what He wants
This is the first time we have ever heard of anyone healing the eyes of someone born blind.
This man must be from God. If he were not from God, he could not do anything like this
Then the Jews said to the man who was blind: You have been a sinner from the day that you were born. You cannot teach us. You may never come back into the synagogue.
They told Jesus that the Jewish leaders had said the man who had been blind could never go into the synagogue again. Jesus found him and asked him, Do you believe in the Son of God?
The once blind man said: ‘Sir, please tell me who the Son of God is, so that I can believe in Him.
Jesus said to once blind man, You have already seen him. The Son of God is the one talking with you now.
The once blind man said: I believe, Lord. And he worshipped Jesus. The once blind man answered, Yes, I believe, Lord! Then he bowed and worshiped Jesus.
Jesus said, I came into this world so that the world could be judged. I came so that people who are blind could see. And I came so that people who think they see would become blind.
Some of the Pharisees who were near Jesus heard this. They said: What? Are you saying that we are blind too?
Jesus talked to the Pharisees and said: It is certainly true that when a man enters the sheep pen, he should use the gate. If he climbs in some other way, he is a thief and a robber
But the man who takes care of the sheep enters through the gate. He is the shepherd.
The Shephard brings all of his sheep out. Then The Shephard goes ahead of them and leads them. The sheep follow him, because they know The Shephard voice
But the sheep will not follow a person if they do not know him. The sheep will run away from him because they do not know the voices of that people
Jesus told this story to the Pharisees, but they did not understand what it meant
Jesus said to the Pharisees, I tell you this and it is true: I, Jesus am the gate for the sheep
The people who came before Me were thieves and robbers but the sheep did not listen to them
I, Jesus am the gate. Whoever enters through me will be saved. They will be able to come in and go out. They will find everything they need.
A thief comes to steal, kill, and destroy. But I came to give life, life that is full and good.
I, Jesus am the Good Shepherd. The Good Shepherd will die so that his sheep can live.

A person who gets money to look after the sheep will not do the same as the Good Shepherd does. A person who gets money to look after the sheep is not a shepherd and the sheep do not belong to him. When he sees a wolf coming, he runs away and leaves the sheep. Then the wolf attacks the sheep and chases them away.
Yes, someone who gets money to look after the sheep runs away, because he does not really care about the sheep.
I am the Good Shepherd. I know my sheep and my sheep know Me,
just like the Father knows Me and I know the Father. I will die so that my sheep can live.
I have other sheep too. They are not in this flock here. I must lead them also. They will listen to my voice. In the future there will be one flock and one shepherd
The Father loves Me because I give my life for the sheep. I will die and I will rise and live again.
No one takes my life away from me. I give my own life freely. I have the right to give my life, and I have the right to get it back again. This is what the Father told me.
When the Jews heard what Jesus said, they argued with each other.
Some Jews said: He has a demon in Him. It is the demon who speaks. He is mad. Don’t listen to Him.
But other Jews said: No, a man who has a demon can not speak as Jesus speaks. A demon can not make blind people see
It was winter, and the time came for the Festival of Dedication at Jerusalem
Jesus went to the temple. Jesus was walking in Solomon’s Porch.
Some Jews came to Jesus and they were standing around Jesus. They asked Jesus: ‘How long must we wait before we can be sure who You are? If You are the Christ, then tell us now.
Jesus said to them: I have already told you, but you do not believe Me. I do things that my Father says I must do and those things show you who I am.
You don’t believe Me because you are not my sheep.
My sheep listen to my voice. I know my sheep and they follow Me.
I give them eternal life. They will never die, and no one can take them out of my hand
My Father is the one who gave them to me, and he is greater than all. No one can steal my sheep out of his hand.
I and the Father are One.
Again the Jews there picked up stones to kill Jesus
Jesus said to them: The many wonderful things you have seen me do are from the Father. Which of these good things are you killing me for?

The Jews said to Jesus: It is not something that You did that makes us angry. We want to kill You because You are speaking against God. You are only a man, but you say you are the same as God! That is why we are trying to kill you!
Jesus said to them: It is written in your law that God said: you are gods?
Then Jesus said: This Scripture called those people gods, the people who received God’s message. And Scripture we can not change this.
So why do you accuse me of insulting God for saying, I am God’s Son? I am the one God chose and sent into the world.
The Father told Me what I must do. If I don’t do it, then you must not believe Me.
But if I do what my Father says to do. You might not believe in me, but you should believe in the things I do. Then you will know and understand that the Father is in me and I am in the Father.
The Jews again tried to arrest Jesus, but they could not do it, because Jesus went away.
Then Jesus went back across the Jordan River to the place where John began his work of baptizing people. Jesus stayed there,
and a lot of people went to Jesus. They said: John has never done a miracle, but everything that John said about Jesus is true.
And many people there believed in Jesus.
There was a man named Lazarus who was sick. Lazarus lived in the town of Bethany, where Mary and her sister Martha lived.
Mary was the woman who had poured perfume on the Lord’s feet and dried his feet with her hair. But now her brother Lazarus was sick.
The sisters,Mary and Martha, sent someone to tell Jesus that Lazarus was sick. Jesus loved Lazarus very much.

When they told Jesus that Lazarus was sick, He said: ‘Lazarus will not die from this sickness. God will use this sickness to show that He is God. Then people will see that I, the Son of God, am also God. John 11: 5 Jesus loved Martha and her sister and Lazarus.
When Jesus had heard therefore that Lazuras was sick, Jesus stayed two days still in the same place where he was
Then Jesus said to his disciples: ‘We must go back to Judaea now.
Jesus disciples said: ‘teacher, the Jews in Judea want to kill You with stones. Why do You want to go back there now?
Jesus said: There are 12 hours in a day. If you walk in the day you will not fall because you see the light of the sun, the light of this world.
But if you walk in the night, then you will fall because there is no light.
Then Jesus said, Our friend Lazarus is now sleeping, but I am going there to wake him.
The disciples said to Him: ‘Lord, if he is sleeping, he will get better.’
They thought Jesus meant that Lazarus was literally sleeping, but he really meant that Lazarus was dead.
So then Jesus said plainly, “Lazarus is dead.
I’m glad for you that I wasn’t there so that you may believe. But let’s go to him
Then Thomas, the one called Didymus (Twin) said to the other followers, we will go too. We will die there with Jesus
Jesus arrived in Bethany and found that Lazarus had already been dead and in the tomb for four days.
Bethany was about two miles from Jerusalem.
Many Jews had come to see Martha and Mary. They came to comfort them about their brother Lazarus.
When Martha heard that Jesus was coming, she went out to greet him. But Mary stayed home
Then said Martha unto Jesus, Lord, if you had been here, my brother would have not died.
But I know that even now God will give you anything you ask.
Jesus said, Your brother will rise and be alive again.
Martha answered, “I know that he will rise to live again at the time of the resurrection on the last day.
Jesus said to Martha, I am the resurrection. I am life. Everyone who believes in me will have life, even if they die.
And everyone who lives and believes in me will never really die. Martha, do you believe this?
Martha said to Jesus: Yes, Lord, I believe you are the Christ, the Son of God. I believe you are the One that God has sent to the world
After Martha said these things, she went back to her sister Mary. She talked to Mary alone and said, “The Teacher is here. He is asking for you.”
When Mary heard this, she stood up and went quickly to Jesus.
He had not yet come into the village. He was still at the place where Martha met him
The Jews who were in the house comforting Mary saw her get up and leave quickly. They thought she was going to the tomb to cry there.
Mary went to the place where Jesus was. When Mary saw Jesus, Mary bowed at Jesus feet and said, Lord, if you had been here, my brother would not have died.
When Jesus saw Mary crying and the people with her crying too, he was very upset and troubled.
He asked, Where did you put him? They said, Lord, come and see.
Jesus cried.
And the Jews said, Look! Jesus loved Lazarus very much!
But some of them said, Jesus healed the eyes of the blind man. Why didn’t he help Lazarus and stop him from dying?
When Jesus came to the tomb, He became very sad again. The tomb was a cave and there was a stone in front of the door.
He said, Move the stone away. Martha, sister of Lazarus said, But, Lord, it has been four days since Lazarus died. There will be a bad smell.
Then Jesus said to Martha, Remember what I told you? I said that if you believe, and then you will see how God will shows that He is God.
So they moved the stone away from the entrance. Then Jesus looked up and said, Father, I thank you that you heard me.
I know that you always hear me. But I said these things because of the people here around me. I want them to believe that you sent me.
After Jesus said this he called in a loud voice, Lazarus, come out!
The dead man came out. His hands and feet were wrapped with pieces of cloth. He had a handkerchief covering his face. Jesus said to the people, Take off the cloth and let him go.
A lot of Jews who had come to Mary saw how Jesus made Lazarus live again and they believed in Jesus.
But some of the Jews went to the Pharisees and told them what Jesus had done.
The chief priests and Pharisees came together and talked. They said: What can we do? Jesus is doing more and more miracles.
If we don’t do something to stop Jesus, all the people will believe in Him. Then the Romans will destroy our temple and our nation.
Caiaphas was the high-priest that year. He said: You people know nothing
You must know: It is better for one Man to die for all the people than for all the people of the nation to be destroyed
Caiaphas did not think of this himself. As that year’s high priest, he was really prophesying that Jesus would die for the Jewish people.
But Jesus did not die only so that the Jewish people could live. Jesus died for all the children of God, to bring together God’s children in many lands of the world.
From that day the Jewish leaders made plans to kill Jesus.
So Jesus stopped traveling around openly among the Jews. He went away to a town called Ephraim in an area near the desert. He stayed there with his followers.
It was almost time for the Jewish Passover festival. Many people from the country went to Jerusalem before the Passover. They went to do the special things to make themselves pure for the festival
The people started to look for Jesus. In the temple they asked each other: What do you think? Will Jesus come to the Passover or will Jesus not?
The chief priests and Pharisees told all the people: If you know where Jesus is, tell us. We want to arrest Him.
Jesus, 6 days before the Passover festival, went to Bethany, the town where Lazarus lived. (Lazarus was the one that Jesus had made alive again after he had died).
There they had a dinner for Jesus. Martha served the food, and Lazarus was one of the people eating with Jesus at the table.
Mary had a jar of expensive perfume and Mary poured it onto Jesus’ feet and then she dried Jesus’ feet with her hair. The people in the house could smell the sweet perfume everywhere.
Judas Iscariot, the son of Simon, one of Jesus’ followers, was there. Judas is the one who would later hand Jesus over to his enemies. Judas said.
Mary has wasted this expensive perfume. We could have sold it for 300 silver coins and given the money to poor people.
But Judas did not really care about the poor. Judas said this because he was a thief. Judas was the one who kept the moneybag for the group of followers.
Jesus said: Don’t stop Mary. Mary has kept this perfume to anoint Me now for the day that they will bury Me.
Jesus said, You will always have poor people with you and you can give them money when you want to, but I will not always be with you.
A lot of the Jews found out that Jesus was in the town of Bethany, and they came to the town. They wanted to see Jesus, but they also wanted to see Lazarus because Jesus had made him alive again.
The chief priests made plans to kill Lazarus.
Because Jesus had made Lazarus alive again, many Jews were leaving the chief priest and started believing in Jesus.
The next day the people in Jerusalem heard that Jesus was coming there. There were a lot of people in Jerusalem for Passover.
The people took branches of palm trees and they went to Jesus. They shouted loudly and said: Praise God. Praise Him! God bless the King of Israel the one who comes in the name of the Lord!

Jesus found a young donkey and Jesus sat on the young donkey. It happened as it is written in the Old Testament: John 12: 15 People of Jerusalem, do not be afraid. Your king is coming to you now. The king is riding on a young donkey.
On that day Jesus’ disciples did not understand what had happened. But after Jesus was raised to glory, the disciples understood that this was written about Jesus.
The people who were with Jesus when Jesus called Lazarus to come out of the tomb, and to live again, told this to all the people everywhere they went.
A lot of people heard about this miracle that Jesus had done and they came to Jerusalem to see Him.
The Pharisees said to each other: Our plan is not working. The people are all following Jesus.
There were also Greeks who came to Jerusalem for the Passover to worship God.
Some of the Greeks went to Philip, who was from Bethsaida in Galilee. The Greeks said, Sir, we want to meet Jesus.
Philip went to Andrew and he told Andrew that the Greeks wanted to talk to Jesus. Then Andrew and Philip went to Jesus, and they told Jesus that the Greeks wanted to see Him.
Jesus said to Andrew and Philip: The time has come for the Son of Man to receive his glory.

I tell you, Andrew and Philip, this and it is true: a grain of wheat must fall to the ground and die before it can grow and produce much more wheat. If it never dies, it will never be more than a single seed.
Whoever loves the life they have now will lose it. But whoever is willing to give up their life in this world will keep it. They will have eternal life.
Whoever serves me must follow me. My servants must be with me everywhere I am. My Father will give honor to anyone who serves me.
Jesus said: Now I am very troubled. What must I ask my Father? Must I ask Him to save Me so that I will not suffer? No, I will not ask that, because I came to this world to suffer.
Jesus prayed said: Father, do what will bring you glory! Then a voice came from heaven, I have already brought glory to myself. I will do it again.
The people who were there heard God speaking. Some of them said: We have heard thunder, and other people said: An angel has talked to Jesus.
Then Jesus told them: God spoke from heaven so that you can hear his voice. God did for you and not for me.
God is going to judge the people of the world now. He will defeat Satan, the leader of the people of this world.
When I am lifted up from the earth, I will bring all the people to Me.
(When Jesus said He would be lifted up from the earth, Jesus meant that He would hang on a cross).
The people said: The Old Testament says that the Christ will live forever on earth, but You say the Son of man will be lifted above the earth. Who is this Son of man that You talk about?

Then Jesus said. I am the light. The light will be with you for only a short time more. So walk while you have the light. Then the darkness will not catch you. People who walk in the darkness don’t know where they are going.
I am the light, and I am here with you. You must believe in Me, then you will be children of the light. After Jesus had said this, He went away, and they did not know where He was.
The people saw all the miracles that Jesus had done, but they still did not believe in Him.
This was to give full meaning to what Isaiah the prophet said: Lord, who believed what we told them? Who has seen the Lord’s power?
Isaiah also said why they could not believe.

Isaiah said: God has closed their eyes so that they can not see. God has made their hearts hard. That is why they are blind and can not understand and why they do not start to live as God wants. That is why I will not heal them, said God.
Isaiah said all of this because he saw that Jesus was God. Yes, Isaiah spoke about Jesus.

A lot of people started to believe in Jesus, even some of the Jewish leaders. But they did not tell anyone. They were afraid of the Pharisees who said that they could never go into the synagogue again if they believed in Jesus.
Those leaders wanted other people to say good things about them, more than they wanted God to say they were good.
Jesus said loudly: Anyone who believes in Me does not believe only in Me. He also believes in God who has sent Me to the world.
Yes, if someone sees Me, then he also sees God who has sent Me to the world.
I came to be a light for the people of the world. That is why anyone who believes in Me will not live in the dark.
I did not come into the world to judge people. I came to save the people in the world. So I am not the one who judges those who hear my teaching and do not believe.
No, it is my words that will judge them on the last day. The message that I have spoken will judge everyone who do not believe in Me or listen to the words that I said.
The things that I say do not come from Me. The Father who has sent Me to the world has told Me to say every word that I speak.
I know the things that the Father said to Me give eternal life. That is why I have told you everything that the Father has said to Me.

It was near the time for the Passover. Jesus knew that it was almost time for Him to leave this world and go back to his Father in heaven. Jesus had always loved the people in the world who belonged to Him and Jesus loved them to the end. He showed it when He died for them on the cross
Jesus and his followers were at the evening meal. The devil had already persuaded Judas Iscariot to hand Jesus over to his enemies. (Judas was the son of Simon.)
Jesus knew that the Father had given Him the power over everything and everyone. He also knew that He had come from God and that He would go back to God the Father.
So while they were eating, Jesus got up from the table. He took off his robe and Jesus tied a towel around his body like the servant always did when they served people
Then Jesus poured water into a bowl and Jesus started to wash the feet of his disciples. Jesus also dried their feet with the towel around his hips.
Jesus also wanted to wash Peter’s feet, but Peter asked Jesus: Lord, do You want to wash my feet?
Jesus answered, You don’t know what I am doing now. But later you will understand.
Peter said to Jesus: No, Lord, You will never wash my feet. Jesus said to him: ‘If I do not wash your feet, you can not be my disciple.
Simon Peter said, Lord, after you wash my feet, wash my hands and my head too!
But Jesus said to him: A person who has bathed is clean. His body is clean, and it is only his feet that need to be washed. You, who are here with Me, are clean, but not all of you.
Jesus knew that Judas would betray Him. That is why He said: Not all of you are clean.

After Jesus had washed the feet of his disciples, Jesus put his robe on again. He went back to his place at the table and Jesus asked his disciples: Do you understand what it means that I have washed your feet?
You say I am your Teacher and your Lord. That is right. I am your Teacher and your Lord,
but if your Teacher and Lord washes your feet, then you must also wash each other’s feet.
I have given you an example. You must do to other people what I have done to you.
I tell you this and it is sure: A servant is not more important than his master. A messenger is not more important than the man who has sent him.
Now you have heard what I say. If you do it, God will bless you.
I am not talking about all of you. I know the people that I have chosen, but it will happen as it is written in the Old Testament: Someone who ate with me has become my enemy.
I am telling you now before it happens, then later on when it happens, you will believe that I am God.
I tell you this and it is sure: When I send someone to bring a message and people listen to him, they listen to Me. And when people listen to Me, they listen to the Father who has sent Me.’
After Jesus said these things, he felt very troubled. He said openly, Believe me when I say that one of will betray Me.’
The disciples looked at each other. They were very surprised because they did not know who Jesus was talking about.
The disciple that Jesus loved very much was sitting next to Jesus.
Simon Peter made signs to this disciple and told him to ask Jesus who it was who would betray Him.
Then leaning back against Jesus’ chest, John asked Him privately, Lord, who is it?
Jesus answered him, I will dip this bread into the dish. The man I give it to is the one. So Jesus took a piece of bread, dipped it, and gave it to Judas Iscariot, the son of Simon.
When Judas took the bread, Satan entered him. Jesus said to Judas, What you will do, do it quickly!
The other disciples did not understand why Jesus said to Judas that he must hurry.
Judas always had the money bag and some of the disciples thought that Jesus had told Judas to go and buy something for the feast or to give something to the poor people.
After Judas had taken the bread, he went out immediately. It was night.
After Judas had gone out, Jesus said: Now God will show that I, the Son of man, am also God. God has used Me to show that He is God.
Yes, God used Me to show that He is God and God will show that I am also God. He will not wait long. He will do it now.
My dear friends, I will be with you for only a short while. You will look for Me, but I tell you now what I have told the Jews: I am going to a place, but you can not come there.
I give you a new law now: You must love each other as I have loved you.
If you love each other, then everyone will know that you are my disciples.’
Simon-Peter said to Jesus: Lord, where are You going? Jesus said to him: You can not come with Me now. You will come later.
Peter said to Him: Lord, why can I not go with You now? I will die to protect You.
Jesus said to him: No, Peter, you said you will die to protect Me, but I tell you this and it is sure: Before the cock crows tomorrow morning, you will say 3 times that you do not know Me.

14.source: Drafted from the public-domain King James Version in the simple-English style of this Bible.

verses.text: Don't let your hearts be worried. You believe in God; believe in me also.
There are many rooms in my Father's house. If it were not true, I would have told you. I am going there to prepare a place for you.
And after I go and prepare a place for you, I will come back and take you to be with me, so that you can be where I am.
You know the way to the place where I am going.
Thomas said to him: Lord, we don't know where you are going, so how can we know the way?
Jesus said to him: I am the way, and the truth, and the life. No one comes to the Father except through me.
If you really knew me, you would know my Father too. From now on you do know him, and you have seen him.
Philip said to him: Lord, show us the Father. That is all we need.
Jesus said to him: Philip, I have been with you such a long time. Don't you know me yet? Anyone who has seen me has seen the Father. So how can you say, Show us the Father?
Don't you believe that I am in the Father, and the Father is in me? The words I say to you do not come from me alone. The Father, who lives in me, is doing his work through me.
Believe me when I say that I am in the Father, and the Father is in me. Or at least believe because of the works themselves.
I tell you the truth: anyone who believes in me will do the same works I do. He will do even greater works than these, because I am going to the Father.
And I will do anything you ask in my name, so that the Father will be honored through the Son.
If you ask me for anything in my name, I will do it.
If you love me, you will obey my commands.
And I will ask the Father, and he will give you another Helper to be with you forever.
He is the Spirit of truth. The world cannot accept him, because it does not see him or know him. But you know him, because he lives with you and will be in you.
I will not leave you all alone. I will come to you.
